ideas.title: What 'AI for your design studio' actually means
ideas.angle: Plain-English Take. Cut hype; explain in owner language where AI fits in an interior/architecture practice (mood boards, specs, BOQ, client updates). Sets up the Bridge 1 week.
ideas.notes: Keep it concrete with one interior example. No jargon.

ideas.title: I'm building an AI system for interior design firms
ideas.angle: Build-in-Public. Introduce the architectural automation. Name the ICP pain in their words (chasing vendor quotes, copy-pasting between five tools, hand-built mood boards/specs).
ideas.notes: First public Bridge 1 proof signal. Bridge metaphor hook.

ideas.title: The pipeline running: brief to plan-faithful render
ideas.angle: Build Receipt. Show mood board -> palette -> material/lighting/BOQ sheet -> plan-faithful render. Real output, organized + documented vs hand-built clutter.

asset.note: user supplies demo project + shareable render/sheets/screen-rec

ideas.notes: Anonymize any real client name. Wed proof asset format TBD (screen-rec vs carousel).

ideas.title: The AI kept moving the furniture
ideas.angle: Build-in-Public honesty post. V1->V4 render plan-faithfulness story: renders ignored the 2D plan; fixed with whitebox-PNG reference + strict layout language. 'The bad versions are the curriculum.'

asset.note: user supplies V1 vs V4 render images

ideas.notes: Strongest trust post of the week. Visual.

ideas.title: Stock-analysis recap + YouTube drop
ideas.angle: Build Receipt + promote YT1. Tie off the Week-1 stock-analysis thread; point to the full YouTube walkthrough.
ideas.notes: First YouTube upload. Promote once on LinkedIn.

ideas.title: Get the basics right before chasing AI (wake-up call)
ideas.angle: Wake-up call for design/construction firms: organized files, a real LinkedIn profile, documented projects come before automation. Promotes YT2.
ideas.notes: LECTURE RISK — frame as 'here's what I keep seeing work', not 'you're doing it wrong'. Hard five-value check on Respect-the-owner before publish.

ideas.title: A free AI advisor for design & architecture firms
ideas.angle: Lead magnet. Share the free Gemini Gem (architecture/interior instructions) — owners can ask how to improve their business step by step. Give value, not a sales ask.

asset.note: user supplies public Gem URL + access method; lead capture is manual for now (DM automation is the separate outreach project)

ideas.cta: free tool (the real CTA of the week)

youtube.title: Why design & construction need AI + free Gem
Live build with a real firm (sister + employees)
youtube.notes: Interview pain points (reuse earlier clips), live-build on a real current project, before/after clutter->organized.
